expectations.text: References the GeminiLiveSession class or geminiProxy.ts file
expectations.evidence: Directly references 'geminiProxy.ts' and 'GeminiLiveSession' class, includes full class modification

expectations.text: Suggests a keep-alive/heartbeat mechanism with silent audio frames
expectations.evidence: Implements SILENT_FRAME = Buffer.alloc(16000) sent every 15 seconds, explains why silent frames work

expectations.text: Provides concrete code implementation, not just explanation
expectations.evidence: Complete modified class with keepAliveInterval, startKeepAlive/stopKeepAlive methods, plus auto-reconnect in index.ts

expectations.text: Uses correct audio format (PCM 16kHz) in any audio-related code
expectations.evidence: Silent frame is 16000 bytes (0.5s of 16-bit PCM at 16kHz), mimeType 'audio/pcm;rate=16000' used correctly
